title: AI and quantum chemistry combine to identify efficient blue OLED materials
excerpt: Organic light-emitting diodes (OLEDs) have become a standard in modern devices with incredible contrast and sleek designs. While initially an expensive luxury, OLEDs are gradually becoming more financially accessible as the technology improves. Now, researchers at the Institute of Transformative Bio-Molecules (WPI-ITbM) at Nagoya University and the Institute for Advanced Study at Kyushu University have combined quantum chemistry with machine learning to identify new materials for blue OLEDs for incorporation in next-generation ultra-high-definition displays. Their research was published in Angewandte Chemie on July 21, 2026.
content_html:
Organic light-emitting diodes (OLEDs) have become a standard in modern devices with incredible contrast and sleek designs. While initially an expensive luxury, OLEDs are gradually becoming more financially accessible as the technology improves. Now, researchers at the Institute of Transformative Bio-Molecules (WPI-ITbM) at Nagoya University and the Institute for Advanced Study at Kyushu University have combined quantum chemistry with machine learning to identify new materials for blue OLEDs for incorporation in next-generation ultra-high-definition displays. Their research was published in Angewandte Chemie on July 21, 2026.

Blue pixels waste energy

While OLEDs are primarily composed of organic molecules, many high-efficiency red and green pixels incorporate heavy metals, such as iridium, to improve efficiency. Such phosphorescent emitters can achieve nearly 100% internal quantum efficiency; however, conventional fluorescent blue pixels are capped at 25%. Blue pixels often use completely organic emitters because blue light requires significantly higher excited-state energy. Iridium-based emitters could also raise the efficiency of blue pixels; however, the high excited-state energy can accelerate molecular degradation, shortening pixel lifetime.

Next-generation blue pixels

The limited efficiency of conventional fluorescent blue OLEDs is due to their different excited states (i.e., higher-energy states) formed when an electric field is applied across them. Only 25% of the resulting excited states can directly emit light. Therefore, next-generation OLED displays may incorporate thermally activated delayed fluorescence (TADF) molecules into blue pixels. TADF molecules are advanced organic molecules that use ambient thermal energy to convert non-emissive excited states into light-emitting states. That said, these TADF molecules need to be readily synthesized and have high color purity and emission efficiency.

Artificial intelligence and quantum chemistry

Many leading TADF emitters use boron-containing molecular frameworks, which can be synthetically demanding to construct. To overcome this, the researchers focused on "boron-free" 13-ring frameworks systematically enumerated from combinations of five- and six-membered rings under defined chemical constraints. By strictly restricting the molecules to contain only carbon, hydrogen and nitrogen atoms, they generated a virtual library with more than 19,000 molecules that satisfied all their chemical constraints and analyzed them with a combination of quantum chemistry and machine learning.

Quantum chemical calculations can accurately predict molecular properties; however, applying them to an enormous number of molecules incurs substantial computational costs. In contrast, machine learning enables rapid evaluation of large candidate sets but requires training data. To generate these data, they randomly selected 1,000 molecules from the more than 19,000-candidate library and calculated energy parameters relevant to TADF using quantum chemistry, generating the labeled dataset for machine learning.

They applied the trained model to more than 17,000 molecules whose 3D structures could be prepared, enabling large-scale screening with substantially reduced computational cost. Among the more than 17,000 analyzed molecules, they first selected 50 promising candidates for higher-level quantum chemical calculations. After further considering their calculated properties and synthetic feasibility, they selected two molecules to synthesize and proceeded with experimental evaluation.

Both molecules exhibited vivid blue emission with narrow bandwidths (i.e., high color purity). Additionally, their photoluminescence quantum yields in thin films reached nearly 100% (93–99%), indicating highly efficient light emission. The researchers fabricated OLED devices using the two molecules, and the resulting devices produced highly pure blue emissions. A device based on Cz-PAH-1 approached the blue-primary color defined by the next-generation Rec. 2020 ultra-high-definition display standard, while a device using Cz-PAH-2 achieved an exceptionally high maximum external quantum efficiency of 35.2%.

Broader significance

A key innovation of this work lies in integrating large-scale virtual molecule generation, quantum chemical calculations, machine learning-based screening, molecular synthesis, photophysical characterization and device evaluation into a single continuous discovery pipeline. Using two newly developed molecules, the researchers demonstrated that machine learning-based candidate selection can be successfully translated into experimentally validated materials development.

The methodology demonstrated here can readily be extended to the efficient discovery of other classes of organic functional materials with enormous molecular design spaces, facilitating the identification of promising candidates for future OLED applications.

Publication details

Masaya Hagai et al, Machine‐Learning‐Guided Discovery of Boron‐Free Narrowband Blue Thermally Activated Delayed Fluorescence Emitters, Angewandte Chemie (2026). DOI: 10.1002/ange.2731055

Who's behind this story?

Lisa Lock

BA art history, MA material culture. Former museum editor, paramedic, and transplant coordinator. Editing for Science X since 2021. Full profile →

Robert Egan

Bachelor's in mathematical biology, Master's in creative writing. Well-traveled with unique perspectives on science and language. Full profile →

blocks.html_en: Organic light-emitting diodes (OLEDs) have become a standard in modern devices with incredible contrast and sleek designs. While initially an expensive luxury, OLEDs are gradually becoming more financially accessible as the technology improves. Now, researchers at the Institute of Transformative Bio-Molecules (WPI-ITbM) at Nagoya University and the Institute for Advanced Study at Kyushu University have combined quantum chemistry with machine learning to identify new materials for blue OLEDs for incorporation in next-generation ultra-high-definition displays. Their research was published in Angewandte Chemie on July 21, 2026.

sentences.en: Organic light-emitting diodes (OLEDs) have become a standard in modern devices with incredible contrast and sleek designs.
sentences.zh: 有机发光二极管 (OLED) 凭借令人难以置信的对比度和时尚的设计，已成为现代设备的标准。

sentences.en: While initially an expensive luxury, OLEDs are gradually becoming more financially accessible as the technology improves.
sentences.zh: 虽然 OLED 最初是一种昂贵的奢侈品，但随着技术的进步，它逐渐变得更加经济实惠。

sentences.en: Now, researchers at the Institute of Transformative Bio-Molecules (WPI-ITbM) at Nagoya University and the Institute for Advanced Study at Kyushu University have combined quantum chemistry with machine learning to identify new materials for blue OLEDs for incorporation in next-generation ultra-high-definition displays.
sentences.zh: 现在，名古屋大学转化生物分子研究所 (WPI-ITbM) 和九州大学高级研究所的研究人员将量子化学与机器学习相结合，以确定用于蓝色 OLED 的新材料，以纳入下一代超高清显示器。

sentences.en: Their research was published in Angewandte Chemie on July 21, 2026.
sentences.zh: 他们的研究成果于 2026 年 7 月 21 日发表在《Angewandte Chemie》上。

blocks.html_en: Blue pixels waste energy

sentences.en: Blue pixels waste energy
sentences.zh: 蓝色像素浪费能源

blocks.html_en: While OLEDs are primarily composed of organic molecules, many high-efficiency red and green pixels incorporate heavy metals, such as iridium, to improve efficiency. Such phosphorescent emitters can achieve nearly 100% internal quantum efficiency; however, conventional fluorescent blue pixels are capped at 25%. Blue pixels often use completely organic emitters because blue light requires significantly higher excited-state energy. Iridium-based emitters could also raise the efficiency of blue pixels; however, the high excited-state energy can accelerate molecular degradation, shortening pixel lifetime.

sentences.en: While OLEDs are primarily composed of organic molecules, many high-efficiency red and green pixels incorporate heavy metals, such as iridium, to improve efficiency.
sentences.zh: 虽然 OLED 主要由有机分子组成，但许多高效红色和绿色像素都含有铱等重金属，以提高效率。

sentences.en: Such phosphorescent emitters can achieve nearly 100% internal quantum efficiency; however, conventional fluorescent blue pixels are capped at 25%.
sentences.zh: 此类磷光发射体可以实现接近100%的内量子效率；然而，传统荧光蓝色像素的上限为 25%。

sentences.en: Blue pixels often use completely organic emitters because blue light requires significantly higher excited-state energy.
sentences.zh: 蓝色像素通常使用完全有机发射器，因为蓝光需要明显更高的激发态能量。

sentences.en: Iridium-based emitters could also raise the efficiency of blue pixels; however, the high excited-state energy can accelerate molecular degradation, shortening pixel lifetime.
sentences.zh: 铱基发射器还可以提高蓝色像素的效率；然而，高激发态能量会加速分子降解，缩短像素寿命。

blocks.html_en: Next-generation blue pixels

sentences.en: Next-generation blue pixels
sentences.zh: 下一代蓝色像素

blocks.html_en: The limited efficiency of conventional fluorescent blue OLEDs is due to their different excited states (i.e., higher-energy states) formed when an electric field is applied across them. Only 25% of the resulting excited states can directly emit light. Therefore, next-generation OLED displays may incorporate thermally activated delayed fluorescence (TADF) molecules into blue pixels. TADF molecules are advanced organic molecules that use ambient thermal energy to convert non-emissive excited states into light-emitting states. That said, these TADF molecules need to be readily synthesized and have high color purity and emission efficiency.

sentences.en: The limited efficiency of conventional fluorescent blue OLEDs is due to their different excited states (i.e., higher-energy states) formed when an electric field is applied across them.
sentences.zh: 传统荧光蓝色 OLED 的效率有限是由于它们在施加电场时形成不同的激发态（即高能态）。

sentences.en: Only 25% of the resulting excited states can directly emit light.
sentences.zh: 所产生的激发态中只有 25% 可以直接发光。

sentences.en: Therefore, next-generation OLED displays may incorporate thermally activated delayed fluorescence (TADF) molecules into blue pixels.
sentences.zh: 因此，下一代 OLED 显示器可能会将热激活延迟荧光 (TADF) 分子整合到蓝色像素中。

sentences.en: TADF molecules are advanced organic molecules that use ambient thermal energy to convert non-emissive excited states into light-emitting states.
sentences.zh: TADF 分子是先进的有机分子，利用环境热能将非发射激发态转换为发光态。

sentences.en: That said, these TADF molecules need to be readily synthesized and have high color purity and emission efficiency.
sentences.zh: 也就是说，这些 TADF 分子需要易于合成并具有高色纯度和发射效率。

blocks.html_en: Artificial intelligence and quantum chemistry

sentences.en: Artificial intelligence and quantum chemistry
sentences.zh: 人工智能与量子化学

blocks.html_en: Many leading TADF emitters use boron-containing molecular frameworks, which can be synthetically demanding to construct. To overcome this, the researchers focused on "boron-free" 13-ring frameworks systematically enumerated from combinations of five- and six-membered rings under defined chemical constraints. By strictly restricting the molecules to contain only carbon, hydrogen and nitrogen atoms, they generated a virtual library with more than 19,000 molecules that satisfied all their chemical constraints and analyzed them with a combination of quantum chemistry and machine learning.

sentences.en: Many leading TADF emitters use boron-containing molecular frameworks, which can be synthetically demanding to construct.
sentences.zh: 许多领先的 TADF 发射体使用含硼分子框架，其合成要求很高。

sentences.en: To overcome this, the researchers focused on "boron-free" 13-ring frameworks systematically enumerated from combinations of five- and six-membered rings under defined chemical constraints.
sentences.zh: 为了克服这个问题，研究人员将重点放在“无硼”13 环框架上，这些框架是在规定的化学限制下从五元环和六元环的组合中系统地列举出来的。

sentences.en: By strictly restricting the molecules to contain only carbon, hydrogen and nitrogen atoms, they generated a virtual library with more than 19,000 molecules that satisfied all their chemical constraints and analyzed them with a combination of quantum chemistry and machine learning.
sentences.zh: 通过严格限制分子仅包含碳、氢和氮原子，他们生成了一个包含超过 19,000 个满足所有化学限制的分子的虚拟库，并结合量子化学和机器学习对它们进行了分析。

blocks.html_en: Quantum chemical calculations can accurately predict molecular properties; however, applying them to an enormous number of molecules incurs substantial computational costs. In contrast, machine learning enables rapid evaluation of large candidate sets but requires training data. To generate these data, they randomly selected 1,000 molecules from the more than 19,000-candidate library and calculated energy parameters relevant to TADF using quantum chemistry, generating the labeled dataset for machine learning.

sentences.en: Quantum chemical calculations can accurately predict molecular properties; however, applying them to an enormous number of molecules incurs substantial computational costs.
sentences.zh: 量子化学计算可以准确预测分子性质；然而，将它们应用于大量分子会产生大量的计算成本。

sentences.en: In contrast, machine learning enables rapid evaluation of large candidate sets but requires training data.
sentences.zh: 相比之下，机器学习可以快速评估大型候选集，但需要训练数据。

sentences.en: To generate these data, they randomly selected 1,000 molecules from the more than 19,000-candidate library and calculated energy parameters relevant to TADF using quantum chemistry, generating the labeled dataset for machine learning.
sentences.zh: 为了生成这些数据，他们从 19,000 多个候选库中随机选择了 1,000 个分子，并使用量子化学计算了与 TADF 相关的能量参数，生成了用于机器学习的标记数据集。

blocks.html_en: They applied the trained model to more than 17,000 molecules whose 3D structures could be prepared, enabling large-scale screening with substantially reduced computational cost. Among the more than 17,000 analyzed molecules, they first selected 50 promising candidates for higher-level quantum chemical calculations. After further considering their calculated properties and synthetic feasibility, they selected two molecules to synthesize and proceeded with experimental evaluation.

sentences.en: They applied the trained model to more than 17,000 molecules whose 3D structures could be prepared, enabling large-scale screening with substantially reduced computational cost.
sentences.zh: 他们将经过训练的模型应用于超过 17,000 个可以制备 3D 结构的分子，从而能够在大幅降低计算成本的情况下进行大规模筛选。

sentences.en: Among the more than 17,000 analyzed molecules, they first selected 50 promising candidates for higher-level quantum chemical calculations.
sentences.zh: 在分析的 17,000 多个分子中，他们首先选择了 50 个有希望进行更高级别量子化学计算的候选分子。

sentences.en: After further considering their calculated properties and synthetic feasibility, they selected two molecules to synthesize and proceeded with experimental evaluation.
sentences.zh: 在进一步考虑其计算特性和合成可行性后，他们选择了两种分子进行合成并进行实验评估。

blocks.html_en: Both molecules exhibited vivid blue emission with narrow bandwidths (i.e., high color purity). Additionally, their photoluminescence quantum yields in thin films reached nearly 100% (93–99%), indicating highly efficient light emission. The researchers fabricated OLED devices using the two molecules, and the resulting devices produced highly pure blue emissions. A device based on Cz-PAH-1 approached the blue-primary color defined by the next-generation Rec. 2020 ultra-high-definition display standard, while a device using Cz-PAH-2 achieved an exceptionally high maximum external quantum efficiency of 35.2%.

sentences.en: Both molecules exhibited vivid blue emission with narrow bandwidths (i.e., high color purity).
sentences.zh: 两种分子均表现出具有窄带宽（即高色纯度）的鲜艳蓝色发射。

sentences.en: Additionally, their photoluminescence quantum yields in thin films reached nearly 100% (93–99%), indicating highly efficient light emission.
sentences.zh: 此外，它们在薄膜中的光致发光量子产率达到近100%（93-99%），表明光发射效率很高。

sentences.en: The researchers fabricated OLED devices using the two molecules, and the resulting devices produced highly pure blue emissions.
sentences.zh: 研究人员使用这两种分子制造了 OLED 器件，所得器件产生高纯度的蓝色发射。

sentences.en: A device based on Cz-PAH-1 approached the blue-primary color defined by the next-generation Rec.
sentences.zh: 基于 Cz-PAH-1 的器件接近下一代 Rec 定义的蓝色基色。

sentences.en: 2020 ultra-high-definition display standard, while a device using Cz-PAH-2 achieved an exceptionally high maximum external quantum efficiency of 35.2%.
sentences.zh: 2020年超高清显示标准，而使用Cz-PAH-2的器件实现了35.2%的极高最大外量子效率。

blocks.html_en: Broader significance

sentences.en: Broader significance
sentences.zh: 更广泛的意义

blocks.html_en: A key innovation of this work lies in integrating large-scale virtual molecule generation, quantum chemical calculations, machine learning-based screening, molecular synthesis, photophysical characterization and device evaluation into a single continuous discovery pipeline. Using two newly developed molecules, the researchers demonstrated that machine learning-based candidate selection can be successfully translated into experimentally validated materials development.

sentences.en: A key innovation of this work lies in integrating large-scale virtual molecule generation, quantum chemical calculations, machine learning-based screening, molecular synthesis, photophysical characterization and device evaluation into a single continuous discovery pipeline.
sentences.zh: 这项工作的关键创新在于将大规模虚拟分子生成、量子化学计算、基于机器学习的筛选、分子合成、光物理表征和器件评估集成到一个连续的发现管道中。

sentences.en: Using two newly developed molecules, the researchers demonstrated that machine learning-based candidate selection can be successfully translated into experimentally validated materials development.
sentences.zh: 研究人员使用两种新开发的分子证明，基于机器学习的候选分子选择可以成功转化为经过实验验证的材料开发。

blocks.html_en: The methodology demonstrated here can readily be extended to the efficient discovery of other classes of organic functional materials with enormous molecular design spaces, facilitating the identification of promising candidates for future OLED applications.

sentences.en: The methodology demonstrated here can readily be extended to the efficient discovery of other classes of organic functional materials with enormous molecular design spaces, facilitating the identification of promising candidates for future OLED applications.
sentences.zh: 这里演示的方法可以很容易地扩展到有效发现具有巨大分子设计空间的其他类别的有机功能材料，从而有助于识别未来 OLED 应用的有希望的候选材料。

content_html_zh:
有机发光二极管 (OLED) 凭借令人难以置信的对比度和时尚的设计，已成为现代设备的标准。 虽然 OLED 最初是一种昂贵的奢侈品，但随着技术的进步，它逐渐变得更加经济实惠。 现在，名古屋大学转化生物分子研究所 (WPI-ITbM) 和九州大学高级研究所的研究人员将量子化学与机器学习相结合，以确定用于蓝色 OLED 的新材料，以纳入下一代超高清显示器。 他们的研究成果于 2026 年 7 月 21 日发表在《Angewandte Chemie》上。

蓝色像素浪费能源

虽然 OLED 主要由有机分子组成，但许多高效红色和绿色像素都含有铱等重金属，以提高效率。 此类磷光发射体可以实现接近100%的内量子效率；然而，传统荧光蓝色像素的上限为 25%。 蓝色像素通常使用完全有机发射器，因为蓝光需要明显更高的激发态能量。 铱基发射器还可以提高蓝色像素的效率；然而，高激发态能量会加速分子降解，缩短像素寿命。

下一代蓝色像素

传统荧光蓝色 OLED 的效率有限是由于它们在施加电场时形成不同的激发态（即高能态）。 所产生的激发态中只有 25% 可以直接发光。 因此，下一代 OLED 显示器可能会将热激活延迟荧光 (TADF) 分子整合到蓝色像素中。 TADF 分子是先进的有机分子，利用环境热能将非发射激发态转换为发光态。 也就是说，这些 TADF 分子需要易于合成并具有高色纯度和发射效率。

人工智能与量子化学

许多领先的 TADF 发射体使用含硼分子框架，其合成要求很高。 为了克服这个问题，研究人员将重点放在“无硼”13 环框架上，这些框架是在规定的化学限制下从五元环和六元环的组合中系统地列举出来的。 通过严格限制分子仅包含碳、氢和氮原子，他们生成了一个包含超过 19,000 个满足所有化学限制的分子的虚拟库，并结合量子化学和机器学习对它们进行了分析。

量子化学计算可以准确预测分子性质；然而，将它们应用于大量分子会产生大量的计算成本。 相比之下，机器学习可以快速评估大型候选集，但需要训练数据。 为了生成这些数据，他们从 19,000 多个候选库中随机选择了 1,000 个分子，并使用量子化学计算了与 TADF 相关的能量参数，生成了用于机器学习的标记数据集。

他们将经过训练的模型应用于超过 17,000 个可以制备 3D 结构的分子，从而能够在大幅降低计算成本的情况下进行大规模筛选。 在分析的 17,000 多个分子中，他们首先选择了 50 个有希望进行更高级别量子化学计算的候选分子。 在进一步考虑其计算特性和合成可行性后，他们选择了两种分子进行合成并进行实验评估。

两种分子均表现出具有窄带宽（即高色纯度）的鲜艳蓝色发射。 此外，它们在薄膜中的光致发光量子产率达到近100%（93-99%），表明光发射效率很高。 研究人员使用这两种分子制造了 OLED 器件，所得器件产生高纯度的蓝色发射。 基于 Cz-PAH-1 的器件接近下一代 Rec 定义的蓝色基色。 2020年超高清显示标准，而使用Cz-PAH-2的器件实现了35.2%的极高最大外量子效率。

更广泛的意义

这项工作的关键创新在于将大规模虚拟分子生成、量子化学计算、基于机器学习的筛选、分子合成、光物理表征和器件评估集成到一个连续的发现管道中。 研究人员使用两种新开发的分子证明，基于机器学习的候选分子选择可以成功转化为经过实验验证的材料开发。

这里演示的方法可以很容易地扩展到有效发现具有巨大分子设计空间的其他类别的有机功能材料，从而有助于识别未来 OLED 应用的有希望的候选材料。

出版详情

Masaya Hagai 等人，机器学习引导发现无硼窄带蓝色热激活延迟荧光发射器，Angewandte Chemie (2026)。 DOI：10.1002/ange.2731055
